name: Browser Proof System
description: Evidence-backed web verification for agents. Verify claims on public webpages and return text evidence, screenshots, and deterministic JSON.

receives.task: string (Verification task or claim to extract)

returns.answer: string (Answer to the task. null on fail)
returns.evidence_text: string (Raw text used as evidence from the page)

behavior: Returns a deterministic JSON format for agent-to-agent communication.
Includes empirical text evidence and proof of provenance.
Automatically saves and links a timestamped screenshot.
All historical verification runs and proof data are stored in Supabase.
History and signed URLs for screenshots can be retrieved via the runs API.
